$comment: Spacing tokens. Three axes — inset (padding inward), stack (vertical gap), inline (horizontal gap). Pick by intent, not by visual match. Code source of truth: packages/ui/src/tokens/tokens.json (semantic.space).

xs.usage: Tight padding inside small interactive elements (badge, dense button).
xs.notes: Tailwind: p-inset-xs. Avoid for any element with a touch target — combine with size to keep >=44x44.

sm.usage: Default padding for form controls (Input, small Button).

md.usage: Default padding for medium containers: chip lists, toast bodies, inline alerts.

lg.usage: Default padding for cards, sheets, modal bodies.
lg.notes: Tailwind: p-inset-lg. The Card primitive ships with this by default.

xl.usage: Spacious padding for marketing sections, empty-state cards, hero blocks.
xl.notes: Tailwind: p-inset-xl. Almost never used in product surfaces below md breakpoint.

stack.$description: Gap between vertically stacked elements. Direction: vertical.

xs.usage: Gap inside a single semantic group (label + input, title + caption).
xs.notes: Tailwind: gap-stack-xs. Default 'inside a group' spacing.

sm.usage: Gap between closely related elements (form fields in a row, list items).

md.usage: Default gap between blocks: cards in a column, paragraphs in prose, form fields.

lg.usage: Gap between sections within a single screen.

xl.usage: Gap between major page regions, marketing sections.
xl.notes: Tailwind: gap-stack-xl. Use sparingly — too much vertical air pushes the primary action below the fold.

inline.$description: Gap between horizontally placed elements. Direction: horizontal.

xs.usage: Hairline gap between adjacent elements (icon + label inside a button).

sm.usage: Default gap between inline buttons, inline tag pills, breadcrumb segments.

md.usage: Gap between distinct inline groups (action button + secondary control).

lg.usage: Spacious inline gap — toolbar groupings, nav item separation.
